rule_text: Scene-paired banner callouts over white backgrounds use fixed scene/color pairings via callout.scene_banner.fill and callout.scene_banner.opacity: Periwinkle @ 80% opacity for Office-scene pieces; Purple @ 60% opacity for Cafe-scene pieces; Green @ 40% opacity for Soccer-scene pieces. These pairings are fixed — do not mix scene and color.
intent: Lock each scene to its designated callout color/opacity so scene and color never mix.
summary: Scene banners over white: Office = Periwinkle 80% opacity, Cafe = Purple 60%, Soccer = Green 40%; fixed scene/color pairings only.
